data.title: MessageGears introduces new segmentation features: dynamic data variables and nested data filters for marketers to create audience segments independently.
data.description: Atlanta-based company MessageGears unveiled two new product features aimed at enhancing marketers' ability to create complex audience segments. The innovations, dynamic data variables and nested data filters, provide marketers with greater flexibility and accuracy in segment creation. Previously, marketers relied heavily on engineering assistance to navigate their organization's data structure for segmentation. With the new features, marketers can now independently create and refine segments without extensive technical knowledge. The updates aim to streamline the segmentation process and empower marketing teams to target audiences more effectively.

data.title: LTC sells 5 skilled nursing centers for $79 million in portfolio transformation. Major sales in Virginia ($51M) and California ($29M).
data.description: A real estate investment trust, LTC Properties, Inc. (NYSE: LTC), recently disclosed the successful sale of five skilled nursing centers as part of their planned disposition of a seven-property portfolio. Among these properties, four are located in Virginia, sold for a total of $51 million, while one in California was sold for $29 million. The total sales proceeds from these transactions amounted to $79 million. These centers are crucial components of LTC’s seniors housing and health care properties investment portfolio.

data.title: The Arbella at Bramble Hill donates $100,000 to Worcester's Affordable Housing Trust Fund, first non-federal contribution.
data.description: In Worcester, Massachusetts on October 23, 2025, the developer of The Arbella at Bramble Hill, a new 55+ Active Adult community on the former Higgins Estate on Salisbury Street, made a generous contribution of $100,000 to the Worcester Affordable Housing Trust Fund (AHTF). This significant donation signals a commitment to supporting affordable housing initiatives in the local community.

data.title: BNB emerges as top performer in October despite Binance market concerns, driven by memecoin popularity and Aster’s climb.
data.description: BNB outperformed Bitcoin in October, experiencing a surge in value fueled by memecoin trading, increasing transaction fees, and the rising popularity of Aster. This growth occurred despite renewed attention on Binance and its operations.

data.title: AT&T Q3 earnings in-line, revenue at $30.71B, EPS at $0.54. Analysts cut forecasts. Added 288K Fiber, 270K Air net users.
data.description: AT&T Inc. (NYSE: T) reported its fiscal third-quarter earnings with operating revenues totaling $30.71 billion, a 1.6% increase from the previous year but slightly lower than the anticipated $30.87 billion. The adjusted earnings per share (EPS) were $0.54, matching analyst estimates. Within its Consumer Wireline segment, AT&T expanded its fiber optic reach by gaining 288,000 AT&T Fiber net subscribers and 270,000 AT&T Internet Air net additions. These developments reflect the company's focus on providing top-notch connectivity services to its customer base.

data.title: Uniti’s research reveals how "fatigue" impacts enterprises, highlighting vulnerabilities in data protection plans due to employee inaction.
data.description: A recent study conducted by Kinetic Business, a division of Uniti, in Little Rock, Ark., unveiled the detrimental effects of "fatigue" on businesses. The research highlighted that companies might be ill-equipped to safeguard their enterprises against ongoing challenges due to employee inaction. The study suggests that businesses are at risk due to a lack of readiness, with important findings indicating a pressing need for proactive measures to ensure business protection. This research underscores the necessity for organizations to address the issue of employee inaction to fortify their defenses and mitigate potential threats effectively.

data.title: 2.7B people without smartphones are excluded from digital identity systems. Offline attestations need to help the disconnected.
data.description: Approximately 2.7 billion individuals are unable to access digital identity systems due to the lack of smartphones. As a result, offline attestations and peer-signed credentials will need to cater to this disconnected population.

data.title: Atlantic Council event discusses tokenization & stablecoin policies, emphasizing regulation and innovation for modernizing financial infrastructure. (Read More)
data.description: During a recent Atlantic Council event, discussions centered around tokenization and stablecoin policies to update financial infrastructure. The event emphasized the importance of regulation, innovation, and institutional adoption as crucial factors. Key topics included the increasing trend of tokenization, the role of stablecoins in financial systems, and the potential benefits for market efficiency. This event gathered over 200 industry experts and policymakers to delve into strategies for advancing these technologies in the financial sector. Overall, the focus was on driving progress in modernizing financial systems through a combination of regulatory frameworks, technological advancements, and widespread adoption.

data.title: Watercrest Buena Vista Senior Living in Vero Beach, Fla., receives 100% deficiency-free survey from Florida state, a significant achievement in senior care.
data.description: A senior living facility in Vero Beach, Florida, called Watercrest Buena Vista Senior Living, received a perfect score on a recent evaluation from the state of Florida. The evaluation, known as a deficiency-free survey, was conducted without prior notice and indicates that the facility met all required standards without any issues. This achievement is significant as it reflects the high quality of care and services provided at Watercrest Buena Vista Senior Living.

data.title: Taiwan Excellence debuts at SEMA Show 2025 in Las Vegas, showcasing edge AI, ADAS, sensor fusion innovations in automotive industry.
data.description: Highlighting cutting-edge technologies such as Edge AI, ADAS, and sensor fusion, Taiwan Excellence is introducing its innovations at SEMA Show 2025 in Las Vegas on October 23. With the automotive sector rapidly moving towards electrification and enhanced intelligence, this debut at the premier aftermarket event emphasizes Taiwan's expertise. The showcase includes state-of-the-art solutions designed to drive industry advancements, with a focus on revolutionizing the sector. This marks Taiwan's prominent presence on the global stage, underscoring its commitment to pioneering advancements in automotive technology.

data.title: METiS BioTech's AI-enabled drug MTS-004 completes Phase III trial in China for PBA treatment, Oct. 23, 2025.
data.description: METiS TechBio, a prominent firm in AI-driven nanodelivery, is set to address the unmet demand for treating Pseudobulbar Affect (PBA) with its new drug, MTS-004. The announcement was made on October 23, 2025, in Beijing, China. Through innovative small-molecule solutions, this advancement showcases a breakthrough for those affected by PBA, a condition influencing over 1 million individuals globally.
